prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科2026年第120名，近年排名稳定；声誉平稳无重大舆情；抖音热度排 名第95位、评价"一般"，报考关注度处于中低水平；食品科学与工程A-，与物理类招生中的食品科学与工程类对应；动物医学、动物科学等涉农专业为该校传统 优势方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化持续高热推荐，机械/智能制造分化观望，土木建筑分化观望，生化环材明显劝退；湖北省20 26年物理类考生估算约25.14万人，较2025年24.98万人微增；2025年物理类本科批省控线426分，近年波动不大；该校在湖北省物理类招生占比约0.47%（2025年 26人/全国5575人），属跨省招生，地域偏好影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年物理类因特殊专业出现异常暴跌、2026年大幅扩招62%以及本省考生微增，2025年暴跌属结构 性异常（特殊项目拉低），2026年扩招后正常专业增多但报考门槛提高（全部要求再选化学），预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年异常基准98920名基础上按扩招弹性后移至约1 25657名，区间125157–126157名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 物理类招生专业较多，分档明显。位次在预测区间125157–126157名内，建议以二档专业为主（食品科学与工程类A-学科、电气工程及其自动化高热推荐），一档专业（计算机类 、生物育种技术）需位次明显优于区间下限方可冲刺，三档专业（动物生产类、农业资源与环境等）作为保底。生物科学中美121项目为特殊招生，报考需满足出国条件。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 23866 → 24706 → 27480 → 33269 → 98920. From 2021 to 2024, rankings shifted backward year by year (cumulative shift of about 9403 places). In 2025, due to the abnormal drop caused by the Biological Sciences Sino-US 121 Dual Degree Program (special enrollment), the ranking plummeted to 98920, while normal major groups ranked around 24295–27750. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 21 in 2021, 22 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 21 in 2025. In 2026 (§7), the plan is 34, an increase of about 62% compared to 2025, a significant expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked 120th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, stable in recent years; reputation stable with no major public incidents; Douyin popularity ranked 95th, rated as "average", with mid-to-low application attention; Food Science and Engineering is A-, corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering category in Physics Category enrollment; Animal Medicine, Animal Science, and other agriculture-related majors are the university's traditional strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended; Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing is in a wait-and-see state; Civil Engineering is in a wait-and-see state; Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Hubei Province in 2026 is about 251,400, a slight increase from 249,800 in 2025; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch provincial control line is 426 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; the university's Physics Category enrollment in Hubei Province accounts for about 0.47% (26 out of 5575 nationally in 2025), which is cross-provincial enrollment, with neutral regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal drop in Physics Category in 2025 due to special majors, the significant 62% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the slight increase in provincial examinees, the 2025 drop is a structural anomaly (pulled down by special programs). After the 2026 expansion, normal majors increase but admission thresholds rise (all require re-selection of Chemistry). It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift backward from the 2025 abnormal baseline of 98920 to approximately 125657, with a range of 125157–126157.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Biological Breeding Technology (Agriculture and Forestry)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Food Science and Engineering (Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, etc.)
- Water Resources (Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering, Hydrology and Water Resources Engineering, Agricultural Water Conservancy Engineering)
- Agricultural Mechanization and Automation (including Top Talent Training Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Animal Production (Animal Science, Grassland Science, Aquaculture)
- Agricultural Resources and Environment (Agriculture and Forestry)
- Facility Agricultural Science and Engineering (Agriculture and Forestry)
- Biological Sciences (Sino-US 121 Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Physics Category has many majors with clear tiers. For rankings within the predicted range of 125157–126157, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Food Science and Engineering A- discipline, Electrical Engineering and Automation highly recommended). Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Biological Breeding Technology) require rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range to be attempted. Tier 3 majors (Animal Production, Agricultural Resources and Environment, etc.) serve as safety options. The Biological Sciences Sino-US 121 program is a special enrollment, requiring applicants to meet study abroad conditions.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大 学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第120名，近年排名稳定在116–122区间；该校在声誉评价文件中未被收录，说明近年无重大舆情事件；抖音热度排名第95位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中低水平，报考关注度平稳；食品科学与工程为A-学科（第五轮学科评估），是该校唯一A类学科， 与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关专业大类中，计算机类、电子信息/通信持续高热推荐，法学偏热，金 融/财经分化观望；湖北省2026年历史类考生估算约14.23万人，较2025年14.14万人微增，2025年历史类本科批442分，近年波动不大；该校位 于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，在湖北省招生占比约0.47%（2025年26人/全国5575人），属跨省招生，地域偏好对湖北考生影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026 年历史类计划大幅扩招80%以及本省考生数微增，扩招带来的竞争稀释效应大于考生增加的影响，预计2026年历史类最低位次在2025年基准5034名基础上后移至约7250名，区间675 0–7750名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4525 → 4868 → 4876 → 5193 → 5034, showing an overall backward trend, fluctuating within the 4876–5193 range in recent three years, with a baseline of about 5034 in 2025; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 5 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 5 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 9, an 80% increase compared to 2025, which is significant and will notably impact the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranked 120th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 116–122 range in recent years; the university is not included in the reputation evaluation file, indicating no major public opinion incidents in recent years; its Douyin popularity ranking is 95th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, and stable application attention; Food Science and Engineering is an A- discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A-class discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering category in the enrollment majors, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among related major categories, Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly recommended, Law is relatively hot, and Finance/Economics is differentiated and wait-and-see; the estimated number of History Category examinees in Hubei Province in 2026 is about 142,300, a slight increase from 141,400 in 2025; the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch score is 442 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, with a proportion of enrollment in Hubei of about 0.47% (26 out of 5,575 nationally in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with a neutral impact on Hubei candidates' regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the significant 80% expansion of the History Category plan in 2026, and the slight increase in the number of provincial examinees, the dilution effect of competition from expansion outweighs the impact of the increase in examinees. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the History Category in 2026 will shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 5034 to approximately 7250, with a range of 6750–7750.
